patient_summary:
• 73/F patient
• Primary Dx: Hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus
• Key Procedures: Ancillary Procedure LGH KISSEL HILL
• Active Meds: 2 medications including Atorvastatin, insulin
• Allergies: NKDA
• Critical Labs: Glucose 199 (H); HDL 38 (L); GFR 50 (A)
• Key History: Former Cigarettes 0.3 packs/day 2 yrs (03/22/1971 - 03/22/1973)
